name: The Proof of Concept
effect: Acknowledge a vendor without committing to an outcome. This card is considered evaluative.

clauses.name: GRATITUDE CLAUSE
clauses.rule: When a vendor presentation concludes: Thank them warmly and provide no other information.

clauses.name: PERPETUATION EFFECT
clauses.rule: If the PoC produces results: Schedule a follow-up PoC to validate the results.

clauses.name: FORGETFULNESS OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: After ninety days: The PoC findings are considered lost and the evaluation restarts.
